etymology.description: зљЃ (zГ o) originally shared components with ж—© (zЗЋo, 'early'), used phonetically in зљ‚ (soap) -> borrowed for the 'acorn' sense
etymology.interpretation: зљЃ (zГ o) as a variant of ж—© (zЗЋo, 'early') was used phonemically in зљ‚ (soap) and retained for 'acorn.' This connection steps from the idea of early maturity or prominence denoted by acorns, metaphorically linked to time as represented by ж—©.
